ContributionAccessor.h
1 // -*- C++ -*-
2 #ifndef LAW_CONTRIBUTIONACCESSOR_H
3 #define LAW_CONTRIBUTIONACCESSOR_H
4 /* Author : desrozis at Thu Mar 26 09:54:51 2015
5  * Generated by createNew
6  */
7 
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/Contribution/VariableFolder.h"
9 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Gump/Pack.h"
10 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/EvaluationResults.h"
11 
12 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
13 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
14 
15 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
16 
17 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
18 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
19 
20 template<ContainerKind::eType CK, ItemKind::eType IK>
21 class ContributionAccessor
22 {
23 public:
24 
25  ContributionAccessor(const VariableFolder<CK,IK>& folder,
26  const FunctionManager& fonctions,
27  const Arcane::Integer stencil_size,
28  const Law::PropertyVector& um)
29  : m_variables(folder.lawVariableManager())
30  , m_accessor(AccessorTraitsType::accessor(m_variables))
31  , m_fonctions(fonctions)
32  , m_results(m_fonctions, m_variables)
33  {
34  Arcane::SharedArray<Law::PropertyVector> properties(stencil_size);
35  {
36  auto dependencies = um.properties();
37  for(Arcane::Integer istencil=0; istencil<stencil_size;++istencil){
38  for(auto p : dependencies) {
39  properties[istencil] << Law::ScalarRealProperty(p);
40  }
41  }
42  }
43  m_results.setExtraDependencies(properties);
44  }
45 
46  ~ContributionAccessor() {}
47 
48  typedef typename FolderTraits<CK,IK>::Contributions ContributionType;
49 
50  ContributionType getVariable(Gump::ScalarRealProperty p) const
51  {
52  _resizeDerivativesIfExist(p);
53  return _getVariable(cast(p));
54  }
55 
56  template<typename P, typename E>
57  ContributionType getVariable(const Gump::EntityT<E>& e) const
58  {
59  return getVariable(P(e.cast()));
60  }
61 
62  template<typename P, typename E>
63  Gump::Pack<E, ContributionType> getVariable(Gump::EnumeratorT<E> e) const
64  {
65  auto size = e.maxFamilyId()+1;
66  Arcane::SharedArray<E> entities(size);
67  Arcane::SharedArray<std::shared_ptr<ContributionType>> variables(size);
68  for( ; e.hasNext(); ++e) {
69  E ee = *e;
70  const Arcane::Integer index = ee.familyId();
71  entities[index] = ee;
72  variables[index] = std::make_shared<ContributionType>(getVariable<P>(ee));
73  }
74  return Gump::Pack<E, ContributionType>(variables, entities);
75  }
76 
77  template<typename E>
78  ContributionType getVariable(const Gump::UserProperty<E>& p) const
79  {
80  _resizeDerivativesIfExist(p);
81  return _getVariable(p);
82  }
83 
84  template<typename E>
85  Gump::Pack<E, ContributionType> getVariable(const Arcane::Array< Gump::UserProperty<E> >& p) const
86  {
87  Arcane::Integer size = 0;
88  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0 ; i < p.size(); ++i) {
89  size = Arcane::math::max(size, p[i].owner().familyId());
90  }
91  Arcane::SharedArray<E> entities(size+1);
92  Arcane::SharedArray<std::shared_ptr<ContributionType>> variables(size+1);
93  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0 ; i < p.size(); ++i) {
94  E ee = p[i].owner();
95  const Arcane::Integer index = ee.familyId();
96  entities[index] = ee;
97  variables[index] = std::make_shared<ContributionType>(getVariable(p[i]));
98  }
99  return Gump::Pack<E, ContributionType>(variables,entities);
100  }
101 
102 private:
103 
104  typedef typename FolderTraits<CK,IK>::AccessorTraitsType AccessorTraitsType;
105  typedef typename FolderTraits<CK,IK>::Accessor AccessorType;
106 
107  template<typename P>
108  void _resizeDerivativesIfExist(P p) const
109  {
110  Law::ScalarRealProperty _p(p);
111  if(m_accessor.hasDerivatives(_p))
112  {
113  int size = m_fonctions.dependencies(_p).size();
114  m_accessor.derivatives(_p).resize(size);
115  }
116  }
117 
118  ContributionType _getVariable(Law::ScalarRealProperty p) const
119  {
120  return m_results[p];
121  }
122 
123 public:
124 
125  const Law::VariableManager& m_variables;
126 
127  const AccessorType m_accessor;
128 
129  const FunctionManager& m_fonctions;
130 
131  Law::EvaluationResults m_results;
132 };
133 
134 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
135 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
136 
137 template<typename P,
138 ContainerKind::eType CK,
139 ItemKind::eType IK,
140 typename E>
141 typename ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>::ContributionType
142 contribution(const VariableFolder<CK,IK>& vars,
143  const FunctionManager& fonctions,
144  const Law::PropertyVector& um,
145  const Gump::EntityT<E>& e)
146 {
147  return ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>(vars, fonctions, 1, um).template getVariable<P>(e);
148 }
149 
150 template<typename P,
151 ContainerKind::eType CK,
152 ItemKind::eType IK,
153 typename E>
154 Gump::Pack<E, typename ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>::ContributionType>
155 contribution(const VariableFolder<CK,IK>& vars,
156  const FunctionManager& fonctions,
157  const Law::PropertyVector& um,
158  const Gump::EnumeratorT<E>& e)
159 {
160  return ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>(vars, fonctions, 1, um).template getVariable<P>(e);
161 }
162 
163 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
164 
165 template<typename P,
166 ContainerKind::eType CK,
167 ItemKind::eType IK,
168 typename E>
169 typename ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>::ContributionType
170 contribution(const VariableFolder<CK,IK>& vars,
171  const FunctionManager& fonctions,
172  const Arcane::Integer stencil_size,
173  const Law::PropertyVector& um,
174  const Gump::EntityT<E>& e)
175 {
176  return ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>(vars, fonctions, stencil_size, um).template getVariable<P>(e);
177 }
178 
179 template<typename P,
180 ContainerKind::eType CK,
181 ItemKind::eType IK,
182 typename E>
183 Gump::Pack<E, typename ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>::ContributionType>
184 contribution(const VariableFolder<CK,IK>& vars,
185  const FunctionManager& fonctions,
186  const Arcane::Integer stencil_size,
187  const Law::PropertyVector& um,
188  const Gump::EnumeratorT<E>& e)
189 {
190  return ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>(vars, fonctions, stencil_size, um).template getVariable<P>(e);
191 }

198 typename ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>::ContributionType
199 contribution(const VariableFolder<CK,IK>& vars,
200  const FunctionManager& fonctions,
201  const Law::PropertyVector& um,
202  const Gump::UserProperty<E>& e)
203 {
204  return ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>(vars,fonctions, 1, um).getVariable(e);
205 }

216 {

218 }

226 contribution(const VariableFolder<CK,IK>& vars,
227  const FunctionManager& fonctions,
228  const Law::PropertyVector& um,
229  const Arcane::Array<Gump::UserProperty<E>>& e)
230 {
231  return ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>(vars, fonctions, 1, um).getVariable(e);
232 }

238 contribution(const VariableFolder<CK,IK>& vars,

241  const Law::PropertyVector& um,
242  const Arcane::Array<Gump::UserProperty<E>>& e)
243 {
244  return ContributionAccessor<CK,IK>(vars, fonctions, stencil_size, um).getVariable(e);
245 }
